title: Audit CLAUDE.md congress docs vs actual implementation

log.context: Audit CLAUDE.md congress docs vs actual implementation

Audit complete. Here's a summary of the key findings:

**Critical discrepancies:**
1. **Kwame (architect.md) has `status: eligible`** — docs say he was fired 2026-03-25 and is ineligible. He's currently sitting in every congress.
2. **`hello-world/serve.py` is referenced in the Key Files table but doesn't exist** — the congress API moved to clunger TypeScript long ago (`/mnt/data/clunger/src/services/congress.ts`).
